raw_title: Same Same But (Very) Different? A Mixed-Method Approach on Security-Related News Consumption on Traditional and Social Media and Its Relation to Negative Emotional Responses and Feelings of (In)Security
title_en: Same Same But (Very) Different? A Mixed-Method Approach on Security-Related News Consumption on Traditional and Social Media and Its Relation to Negative Emotional Responses and Feelings of (In)Security
title_zh: 相同但（非常）不同？传统媒体和社交媒体上安全相关新闻消费及其与负面情绪反应和（不）安全感的混合方法研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们通过传统媒体和社交媒体消费安全相关新闻时，如何产生负面情绪和不安全感。研究者使用了混合方法（如调查和实验）来比较不同媒体平台的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how consuming security-related news on traditional and social media leads to negative emotions and feelings of insecurity. Researchers used mixed methods (e.g., surveys and experiments) to compare the effects of different media platforms.
research_direction_zh: 媒体心理学与传播效果研究，关注新闻消费对情绪和安全感的影响。
research_direction_en: Media psychology and communication effects, focusing on how news consumption influences emotions and perceived security.
